news.headline: Jefferies suggests considering elimination of debt limit, according to Axios.
Pioneering L.G.B.T.Q. journalist, Troy Masters, passes away at 63. Led Gay City News and The Los Angeles Blade since 2017.
news.summary: He led prominent publications, such as Gay City News in New York City and The Los Angeles Blade since 2017.

news.headline: Elon Musk supports Johnson's plan to prevent shutdown as House vote commences amid growing concerns.
Win a Whataburger wedding on Las Vegas Strip for one lucky couple on Valentine's Day.
news.summary: A fortunate couple has the chance to win a unique Whataburger-themed wedding on the iconic Las Vegas Strip. Whataburger is offering couples the opportunity to say their vows with a Whataburger in hand this Valentine's Day. This one-of-a-kind wedding experience will surely make hearts flutter and taste buds delight.

news.headline: Rock Mountain Technology rebrands as Tech Legion, aiming for growth beyond Utah. Known for IT services for 15 years.
news.summary: A company based in Salt Lake City, formerly known as Rock Mountain Technology (RMT), has officially rebranded as Tech Legion. With over 15 years of experience in providing managed IT services, the company aims to expand its reach beyond Utah into various markets across the Intermountain West and beyond. Tech Legion has gained recognition for its top-notch IT services tailored for mid- and small-sized businesses, with a focus on IT outsourcing and cybersecurity. The rebranding signifies the company's growth and its ambitious plans for the future.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rebound as bulls fight back after sell-off. Palantir leads winners; government shutdown may be imminent.
news.summary: After a week of bearish trends, stock market bulls made a comeback on Friday. Palantir emerged as one of the top performers. The possibility of a government shutdown looms. The latest update on Dow Jones Futures highlights the market rebound with Palantir leading the way. For investors, it is essential to assess the current situation and strategize for potential market shifts.

NOG breaks policy to address acquisition rumor of Granite Ridge, largest non-operator with many potential opportunities.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE: NOG) released a statement regarding recent rumors of the company potentially acquiring Granite Ridge Resources. While NOG typically refrains from commenting on acquisition speculations, it felt compelled to address the recent article. As the leading publicly traded non-operator, NOG boasts a substantial acquisition pipeline, often sending expressions of interest for purchasing assets or companies. This reinforces NOG's active stance in seeking strategic growth opportunities.

news.headline: House approved a plan to fund government as shutdown deadline approaches.
WillowWood wins Gold Anthem Award for Product and Innovation in 2024 rebrand. Prestigious honor in Mt. Sterling, Ohio.
news.summary: In Mt. Sterling, Ohio on December 20, 2024, WillowWood, a renowned company in prosthetic solutions, celebrated receiving the esteemed Gold Anthem Award Honor in the Product and Innovation category for their recent 2024 rebranding efforts. This recognition highlights the company's transformation with an emphasis on product development and innovation.

news.headline: Teamsters plan to strike at midnight at Amazon NYC warehouse as part of labor dispute.

Middle class faces tough 2025 as wealthy continue to spend generously. Economic uncertainty ahead.
Abstrakt CEO discusses future B2B trends: Cold calling decline, omnichannel rise by 2025.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Eric Watkins, President of Abstrakt in St. Louis, discussed the evolving B2B sales landscape, noting a decrease in reliance on traditional cold calling. Watkins highlighted the rising ineffectiveness of cold calling as companies transition towards omnichannel approaches. This shift underscores the diminishing impact of cold calling in sales strategies, indicating a move towards more diverse and integrated communication methods.

news.headline: Finward Bancorp declares $0.12 dividend/share on common stock, payable on Feb 3, 2025 to shareholders as of Jan 21, 2025.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Finward Bancorp (Nasdaq: FNWD) revealed a dividend declaration of $0.12 per share on Finward’s common stock. This dividend will be payable on February 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of January 21, 2025. Finward Bancorp is the holding company for Peoples Bank located in Munster, Ind.

House poised to pass stopgap funding bill

Brookfield Infrastructure reorganization closes Dec 24, 2024, after all approvals received.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P., trading under NYSE: BIP and TSX: BIP.UN, along with Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation, listed on both TSX and NYSE as BIPC, confirmed that they have secured all necessary approvals for the planned reorganization of BIPC, known as the “Arrangement.” The completion is set to take place before the markets open on December 24, 2024.

news.headline: NASA Near Space Network awards contracts with max value of $4.82 billion
Thought Technology Ltd in Montreal marked 50 years of providing psychophysiological devices globally.
news.summary: Celebrating its 50th year in operation, Montreal-headquartered Thought Technology Ltd has successfully served an international clientele with psychophysiological instrumentation. As of December 20, 2024, the company remains at the forefront of the industry, offering biofeedback solutions to customers worldwide.

news.headline: Brookfield Renewable reorganization closing on Dec. 24, 2024, after receiving all approvals. BEP & BEPC involved.
news.summary: Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. ("BEP") and Brookfield Renewable Corporation ("BEPC") have officially announced the receipt of necessary approvals for the planned reorganization of BEPC. The process has been approved by shareholders, courts, and regulatory bodies. The reorganization, known as the "Arrangement," is set to be effective from December 24, 2024, before the markets open. BEP is listed on NYSE with ticker symbol BEP, and TSX as BEP.UN, while BEPC is listed on NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbols BEPC.

Improper indexing hampers DApp speed as users expect a response within 3 seconds, but Web3 apps can take 20 seconds to load.
news.summary: Most users abandon an application if it does not load within three seconds, and Web3 apps may have loading times of as long as 20 seconds.

Scaramucci sees Bitcoin's moves as normal cycle, altcoins may have peaked. Bitcoin purges leveraged trades, some altcoins may be done.
news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the founder of SkyBridge Capital, recently commented on Bitcoin's current price movement, labeling it as a typical phase in its cycle. In a recent post, he noted that Bitcoin is clearing out leveraged, short-term momentum trades, which is a regular occurrence in the market's progression. Scaramucci also hinted that certain altcoins might have had their final peak and could be on a downward trend. On the other hand, crypto entrepreneur JC X stated that human behavior tends to stay constant; when Bitcoin experiences a surge, investors are ... (Continues on original source).

news.headline: Despite valuation concerns, Palantir stock rebounds for weekly gain. AI leader's performance amidst uncertainty.
news.summary: Shares of Palantir rebounded this week, posting a gain despite concerns over the valuation of the prominent artificial intelligence company. The stock showed resilience as it managed to secure a weekly increase in value, signaling investors' confidence in the company. This positive performance contrasts with the uncertainties surrounding Palantir's worth in the market.

news.headline: Eric Watkins from Abstrakt talks about challenges in building internal SDR teams due to rising costs and complex tech needs.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in St. Louis, Eric Watkins, the President of Abstrakt, discussed the notable difficulties that businesses encounter when establishing internal Sales Development Representative (SDR) teams. The increasing expenses, intricate technology requirements, and prolonged durations are posing significant challenges for companies in this regard.

news.headline: Luigi Mangione faces new court date on Monday, as stated by NY prosecutors.
FDA approves Zepbound (tirzepatide) for moderate to severe OSA in adults with obesity, in combination with diet.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on December 20, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration gave its approval for Zepbound (tirzepatide) to address moderate to severe cases of obstructive sleep apnea (OSA) in adults with obesity. This treatment is recommended alongside a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity.

news.headline: Johnson confident stopgap legislation will pass.
Qualcomm pleased with trial verdict win affirming its innovation rights and ARM contract protection.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from San Diego, Qualcomm expressed satisfaction with the jury's decision. They feel vindicated in their innovation rights and maintain that all Qualcomm products involved in the case are safeguarded by the company's contract with ARM. Qualcomm intends to persist in creating high-performance products that benefit consumers globally, utilizing their advanced Oryon ARM-compliant custom CPUs. The company, known for its relentless innovation, strives to provide intelligent computing solutions worldwide.

news.headline: Jeffries: White House and Schumer Back GOP Bill, according to Punchbowl.
House votes on new temporary government funding bill
Hunter Truck is opening a new Peterbilt dealership in Scranton, PA at 2900 Stafford Avenue on 1/6/2025 to serve customers in the area, offering a state-of-the-art facility for sales and parts.
news.summary: Hunter Truck – Scranton is thrilled to share the news that they will be relocating to their permanent location at 2900 Stafford Avenue, Scranton, PA 18505 this fall. The new facility is set to open on 1/6/2025 in Scranton, Pennsylvania, catering to customers in the wider Scranton area. President Jeffrey Hunter expressed his enthusiasm, stating, "We are delighted to incorporate a cutting-edge, comprehensive Peterbilt dealership into our network. Our dedication remains in providing tailored sales, part services."

news.headline: Abstrakt's CRO Jeff Winters shares SEO secrets on The Grow Show podcast, leading business growth discussions.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in St. Louis, Abstrakt is making waves in the business growth sphere through its well-received podcast, The Grow Show. The most recent episode titled "Decoding SEO: Insider Secrets from an Expert" features discussions led by Chief Revenue Officer Jeff Winters and Director of Digital Strategy Adam, offering valuable insights for listeners.

news.headline: Josh Berman appointed EVP, Assembly lead in North America, enhancing leadership team for enhanced client services. NYC, Dec 20, 2024 /PRNewswire
news.summary: Assembly, a prominent global marketing agency under the Stagwell network, revealed on December 20, 2024, its dedication to enhancing its leadership team to provide superior services for clients through a significant new hire. This move showcases Assembly's commitment to delivering top-tier results for its clientele.

news.headline: CEO Scott Scully introduces A-Player Scores for sales team tracking to enhance performance efficiency.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in St. Louis, Scott Scully, the CEO of Abstrakt, emphasized the significance of A-Player Scores in enabling sales managers to monitor their team's performance and productivity effectively. This method promotes transparency in assessing both individual and team efforts, providing a structured framework for evaluation and improvement.

news.headline: Melcor REIT issues non-cash special distribution of $0.36 per trust unit to unitholders to offset taxable income.
news.summary: Melcor Real Estate Investment Trust (Melcor REIT) based in Edmonton, Alberta, disclosed a special non-cash distribution of $0.36 per outstanding trust unit on December 20, 2024. This distribution is designated for unitholders recorded as of December 31, 2024. The stated amount matches the REIT’s projected taxable income and capital gains for 2024, less any deductions from cash distributions in the year. The primary aim of this special distribution is to bring the REIT’s taxable income for the fiscal year 2024 down to zero.

Biden cancels regs on student loans and trans athletes, acknowledging they wouldn't pass under Trump.
news.summary: The choice to retract the regulations appeared to acknowledge that they would not progress under the previous administration.
